subject: docs(todo): prune completed items across all 10 downstream repos
body:
Re-audited every per-repo TODO via GitHub API (one agent per repo) on
2026-04-18. Deleted completed items per CLAUDE.md rule ("delete completed
items — git history tracks them"). File shrinks 1011 → 809 lines.

Key deletions:
- canva-grid: HISTORY.md, Communication, ICON_CACHE_BUST sections
- budgy-ting: HISTORY.md, DOWNLOAD_PDF, Communication, EVENT_BUS + most
  ICON_CACHE_BUST items
- repo-tor: Communication, ICON_CACHE_BUST sections
- graphiki: HISTORY.md, CLAUDE.md Align, BURGER_MENU, DEBUG_SYSTEM,
  PWA_SYSTEM, EVENT_BUS + most ICON_CACHE_BUST items
- few-lap: HISTORY.md, CLAUDE.md Align, APP_ICONS, BURGER_MENU sections
- model-pear: DEBUG_SYSTEM section + prohibition sub-item

Corrections:
- synctone flash-prevention script marked present on 2026-04-17 is NOT
  actually in +html.tsx; added back as a pending item.

Gap Matrix updated, Cross-Cutting Gaps rewritten to reflect new state.
Triggers replacement remains the only universal outstanding item across
all 10 downstream repos.

Tags: documentation, audit, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
